nasb.text: So Daniel went in and requested of the king that he would give him time, in order that he might declare the interpretation to the king.

esv.text: And Daniel went in and requested the king to appoint him a time, that he might show the interpretation to the king.

cnv.text: 但以理就進去，求王寬限，使他可以把那夢的意思為王解釋。

ccb.text: 但以理便进宫求王宽限，以便为王解梦。
